title: 便宜的Token，难赚的钱：AI行业最尴尬的真相

title: 公司，开始变得多余
summary: 本文来自微信公众号： 版面之外 ，作者：画画这几天，“同事.Skill”冲上热搜。离职同事，原来没真的离开。只是被“炼化”成了一个Skill。聊天记录、工作文档、交接资料、项目习惯，被重新喂给系统。然后，一个能模仿他说话方式、处理路径、甚至工作习惯的数字分身，又被放回了组织里。这件事看上去有点荒诞，也有点黑色幽默。过去，一个人离职了。这件事很简单。办交接，退群，停账号，工位空出来，组织里少一个人

title: 甲骨文凌晨6点裁员3万人背后：AI时代真正被重写的是企业生产要素

title: 阿迪达斯不需要下一个Samba
summary:
文｜贺哲馨
  编辑｜乔芊
  天刚擦黑，上海新天地一处老校舍的灯就亮了，人群随着光涌进来。曾经是教室的空间被布置成不同的主题：陈列着《足球周刊》、挂满复古球衣或者摆着摊位。人群在楼上楼下反复流动，像在逛一个临时拼起来的跳蚤市场，而不是一场发布会。

title: 哪些情况可能导致因心源性猝死？第一时间该怎样急救？可以怎样尽早发现？

查看知乎原文



在回答这个问题之前，需要先解释常见一个误区。
很多人会默认把心梗（心肌梗死）和心脏骤停 / 心源性猝死混为一谈，实际上这是两个不同的情况，心梗主要是供血堵了，而心脏骤停主要是心脏的电系统活动乱了，导致心脏突然不泵血了。但心梗可以进一步诱发心脏骤停，导致心源性猝死。

title: Oil Falls, US Stock Futures Gain on Ceasefire Bets: Markets Wrap
summary: Oil slumped and US stock futures gained on optimism over a potential diplomatic resolution to the Iran war.

title: Gold Rises as Traders Weigh Last-Minute Diplomacy in Iran War
summary: Gold rose as traders weighed a last-minute diplomatic push to avert US President Donald Trump’s threat to wipe out Iran’s “whole civilization.”

title: Oil Slumps After Pakistan Seeks Last-Minute Iran Extension
summary: Oil slumped the most in two weeks after Pakistan sought a last-minute extension of a US deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Private Credit Experiencing 'Growing Pains,' SLR Capital Partners' Co-CEO Gross
summary:

title: Toilet Paper Facility Fire Risks Disruption to US Market

title: First Brands Judge Delays Sale of 12 Brands to Allow Late Bid
summary: Bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands Group must give a last-minute bidder a chance to buy some of its most-recognizable brands, a federal judge ruled Tuesday.

title: Oncoclinicas Mulls Seeking Emergency Protection From Creditors in Brazil
summary: Oncoclinicas do Brasil Servicos Medicos SA is considering seeking emergency protection from creditors as financial pressures mount, according to people familiar with the matter.
